languages.text: "Ты должен попрощаться с Нунциусом и отпустить его. Просто побудь с ним. Ты должен сделать это ради него и ради себя, не для кого-то еще".
"You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."
languages.original_text: "Ты должен попрощаться с Нунциусом и отпустить его. Просто побудь с ним. Ты должен сделать это ради него и ради себя, не для кого-то еще".

traits.locale_text: "You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."
"You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."
"You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."

languages.text: «Tiene que despedirse de Nuncius y dejarlo ir. Acompáñelo en sus últimos momentos. Debe hacerlo por él y por usted mismo, por nadie más».
languages.original_text: "You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."

traits.locale_text: «Tiene que despedirse de Nuncius y dejarlo ir. Acompáñelo en sus últimos momentos. Debe hacerlo por él y por usted mismo, por nadie más».

languages.text: “你必须跟努恩修斯告别了，放他走。只要陪在他身边就好。你这么做，不是为了别人，是为了他，也是为了你自己。”
languages.original_text: "You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."

traits.locale_text: “你必须跟努恩修斯告别了，放他走。只要陪在他身边就好。你这么做，不是为了别人，是为了他，也是为了你自己。”

languages.text: « Vous devez dire adieu à Nuncius et le laisser mourir. Restez simplement à ses côtés jusqu'à la fin. Faites-le pour lui et pour vous-même, vous ne devez rien à qui que ce soit d'autre. »
languages.original_text: "You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."

traits.locale_text: « Vous devez dire adieu à Nuncius et le laisser mourir. Restez simplement à ses côtés jusqu'à la fin. Faites-le pour lui et pour vous-même, vous ne devez rien à qui que ce soit d'autre. »

languages.text: "Nuncius'a veda etmeli ve onu özgür bırakmalısın. Sadece yanında ol. Bunu kendin ve onun için yapmalısın, başkası için değil."
languages.original_text: "You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius'a veda etmeli ve onu özgür bırakmalısın. Sadece yanında ol. Bunu kendin ve onun için yapmalısın, başkası için değil."

languages.text: "Ihr müsst Euch von Nuncius verabschieden und ihn gehen lassen. Seid einfach bei ihm. Ihr müsst es für ihn und Euch selbst tun, für niemanden sonst."
languages.original_text: "You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr müsst Euch von Nuncius verabschieden und ihn gehen lassen. Seid einfach bei ihm. Ihr müsst es für ihn und Euch selbst tun, für niemanden sonst."

languages.text: 「君はヌンキウスに別れを告げ、彼を逝かせてやらねばならない。ただ、彼のそばにいてやれ。それは彼のため、そして君自身のためにすることだ。ほかの誰のためでもない」
languages.original_text: "You have to say goodbye to Nuncius and let him go. Just be with him. You have to do it for him and for yourself, not for anyone else."

traits.locale_text: 「君はヌンキウスに別れを告げ、彼を逝かせてやらねばならない。ただ、彼のそばにいてやれ。それは彼のため、そして君自身のためにすることだ。ほかの誰のためでもない」
